hotels.name: SchloГѓЕё Ort
hotels.description_fr:
Le meilleur emplacement dans la vieille ville
Notre hГѓВґtel est entourГѓВ© par une atmosphГѓВЁre paisible - directement sur la rive sud de la riviГѓВЁre ГѓВ  cГѓВґtГѓВ© du parc du chГѓВўteau sans route entre les deux. Vous pourrez rejoindre la ville idyllique en seulement quelques minutes ГѓВ  pied. Commencez vos visites ГѓВ  travers Passau depuis notre hГѓВґtel.
Notre hГѓВґtel, l'un des points de repГѓВЁre de la vieille ville historique de Passau, est situГѓВ© directement sur le promontoire oГѓВ№ se rencontrent les riviГѓВЁres Inn, Ilz et Danube. Avec son histoire mouvementГѓВ©e de 800 ans, notre chГѓВўteau est absolument unique. Chacune de nos chambres et suites est meublГѓВ©e individuellement et confortablement. L'atmosphГѓВЁre romantique du chГѓВўteau peut se sentir dans tous les domaines de notre hГѓВґtel.
hotels.description_en:
Our hotel is surrounded by a peaceful atmosphere - directly on the southern bank of the river next to the castle park with no road in between. You can reach the idyllic town in just a few minutes on foot. Start your discovery tours through Passau from our hotel.
Our hotel, one of the landmarks of Passau's historic old town, is located directly on the headland where the Inn, Ilz and Danube rivers meet. With its eventful 800-year history, our castle is absolutely unique. Each of our rooms and suites is individually and comfortably furnished. The romantic castle atmosphere can be felt in all areas of our hotel.
Couples particularly like the location Гўв‚¬вЂќ they rated it 9.9 for a two-person trip.
